data.name: AreYouSure
data.value: Are you sure

data.name: AreYouSureToDelete
data.value: Are you sure to delete?

data.name: BecauseOfRelatedRecords
data.value: This record has some relations.

data.name: CanNotDelete
data.value: Can not delete

data.name: EnterKeywordHere
data.value: Enter Keyword Here

data.name: NoResults
data.value: There is no results to display

data.name: OrderType_Limit_Description
data.value: Executes only at the specified price or better.

data.name: OrderType_Market_Description
data.value: Executes immediately at the best available market price.

data.name: OrderType_Stop_Description
data.value: Becomes a market order once the stop price is reached.

data.name: OrderType_StopLimit_Description
data.value: Becomes a limit order once the stop price is triggered.

data.name: OrderType_TrailingStop_Description
data.value: A stop order that automatically adjusts based on price movement.

data.name: SaveOperationFailed
data.value: Save operation failed!

data.name: SessionType_AfterHours_Description
data.value: Extended trading period after the regular session ends.

data.name: SessionType_Break_Description
data.value: Temporary intraday pause where trading is halted.

data.name: SessionType_ClosingAuction_Description
data.value: Closing auction session where official closing prices are determined.

data.name: SessionType_ElectronicTradingHours_Description
data.value: Extended electronic trading hours on CME Globex.

data.name: SessionType_OpeningAuction_Description
data.value: Opening auction session where the first prices of the day are determined.

data.name: SessionType_PreMarket_Description
data.value: Limited trading period before the regular session begins.

data.name: SessionType_Regular_Description
data.value: The main trading session during standard market hours.

data.name: SessionType_RegularTradingHours_Description
data.value: Standard CME trading hours known as RTH.

data.name: SessionType_SundayOpen_Description
data.value: The first opening session of the week, typically starting Sunday night in FX and crypto.

data.name: UnableToDelete
data.value: Unable to Delete

data.name: UnsavedChangesTitle
data.value: Unsaved Changes

data.name: UnsavedChangesWarning
data.value: You have unsaved changes. Do you want to save before closing?

data.name: YouAreAboutToDelete
data.value: You are about to delete the record
